/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O3 -Wall -Wno-all -Wno-error  -O3 -Wall  -shared -Wl,-soname,librobot_costmap.so -o /home/ubuntu/carerobot_slam_ros1/devel/lib/librobot_costmap.so CMakeFiles/robot_costmap.dir/src/map_deal/edt_environment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_costmap.dir/src/map_deal/grid_map_2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_costmap.dir/src/map_deal/signed_distance_field_2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_costmap.dir/src/map_deal/global_map_deal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_costmap.dir/src/map_deal/local_map_deal.cpp.o
